languages.text: {n}Мужчина, обратившийся к вам, отрывает взгляд от недр пустотного корабля и удивленно смотрит на вас. Под этим взором, словно под пологом вечного мрака, гаснут последние искры сопротивляющегося разума, и вы отчетливо вспоминаете слова своей роли...{/n}

{n}The man who addressed you takes his eyes off the workings of the voidship and stares at you in surprise. Under that intent gaze, like a dark veil descending around you, the last sparks of your resisting mind are snuffed out, and you recall your next line with perfect clarity...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Мужчина, обратившийся к вам, отрывает взгляд от недр пустотного корабля и удивленно смотрит на вас. Под этим взором, словно под пологом вечного мрака, гаснут последние искры сопротивляющегося разума, и вы отчетливо вспоминаете слова своей роли...{/n}

Under that intent gaze, like a dark veil descending around you, the last sparks of your resisting mind are snuffed out, and you recall your next line with perfect clarity...{/n}

{n}The man who addressed you takes his eyes off the workings of the voidship and stares at you in surprise. Under that intent gaze, like a dark veil descending around you, the last sparks of your resisting mind are snuffed out, and you recall your next line with perfect clarity...{/n}

languages.text: {n}El hombre que se ha dirigido a ti aparta la mirada de la actividad de la nave del vacío y te observa con sorpresa. Bajo su atenta mirada, como si un velo oscuro cayese sobre ti, se extinguen los últimos rescoldos de tu fortaleza mental y recuerdas con claridad cuál es tu siguiente frase...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man who addressed you takes his eyes off the workings of the voidship and stares at you in surprise. Under that intent gaze, like a dark veil descending around you, the last sparks of your resisting mind are snuffed out, and you recall your next line with perfect clarity...{/n}

Bajo su atenta mirada, como si un velo oscuro cayese sobre ti, se extinguen los últimos rescoldos de tu fortaleza mental y recuerdas con claridad cuál es tu siguiente frase...{/n}

languages.text: {n}那个和你说话的男人将目光从虚空舰的操控台上移开，惊讶地盯着你。在他那逼人的凝视下，仿佛有层黑暗的帷幕将你笼罩。你最后一丝反抗的意识被抹去，无比清晰地记起了自己的下一句台词……{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man who addressed you takes his eyes off the workings of the voidship and stares at you in surprise. Under that intent gaze, like a dark veil descending around you, the last sparks of your resisting mind are snuffed out, and you recall your next line with perfect clarity...{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'homme qui s'est adressé à vous interrompt sa contemplation pour vous lancer un regard étonné. Ce regard intense, semblable à un voile sombre qui vous tombe dessus, souffle les dernières étincelles de résistance de votre esprit et votre réplique suivante vous revient en mémoire le plus clairement du monde...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man who addressed you takes his eyes off the workings of the voidship and stares at you in surprise. Under that intent gaze, like a dark veil descending around you, the last sparks of your resisting mind are snuffed out, and you recall your next line with perfect clarity...{/n}

Ce regard intense, semblable à un voile sombre qui vous tombe dessus, souffle les dernières étincelles de résistance de votre esprit et votre réplique suivante vous revient en mémoire le plus clairement du monde...{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sana hitap eden adam, gözlerini uçsuz gemisinin işleyişinden ayırıp şaşkınlıkla sana bakıyor. Etrafına inen karanlık bir örtü gibi olan o yoğun bakışın altında, direnen zihninin son kıvılcımları da sönüyor ve bir sonraki repliğini mükemmel bir netlikle hatırlıyorsun...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man who addressed you takes his eyes off the workings of the voidship and stares at you in surprise. Under that intent gaze, like a dark veil descending around you, the last sparks of your resisting mind are snuffed out, and you recall your next line with perfect clarity...{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Mann, der dich angesprochen hat, wendet seine Augen von dem Raumschiff ab und starrt dich überrascht an. Unter seinem durchdringenden Blick, der dich wie ein dunkler Schleier einhüllt, erlöschen die letzten Funken deines widerstrebenden Verstandes und du erinnerst dich überdeutlich an deine nächsten Worte ...{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man who addressed you takes his eyes off the workings of the voidship and stares at you in surprise. Under that intent gaze, like a dark veil descending around you, the last sparks of your resisting mind are snuffed out, and you recall your next line with perfect clarity...{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたに話しかけた男は、空飛ぶ船の動きから目を離し、あなたを驚いた顔でじっと見つめている。その強い視線は、まるであなたを取り囲むように暗く広がるベールのように、あなたの抵抗する心を消し去り、次のセリフを完璧に覚えている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The man who addressed you takes his eyes off the workings of the voidship and stares at you in surprise.
